summary: Two-sided limit-order book / market-depth ladder with cumulative depth bars. Streams live.

props.market: { name, sub?, price, spread, vol?, oi?, trades?, color }

motion.live: size + depth-bar width re-measure with width transition (~500ms ease-reveal)
motion.reduced: snap depth bars to final width; no transition

anti_patterns: animating price columns (only sizes + bars move)
symmetric/centered depth bars (must grow outward from the spread)
source: ROLR market-detail (order book) surface; reskinned from the v1 olive exploration to the shipped indigo brand.
